productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather White Casual Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather and style with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this casual shoe makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag. Upper Leather upper with strategically placed patent leather and twill overlays Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue, collar and footbed for all-day comfort Fabric inner lining for breathable comfort Midsole Phylon midsole for impact protection and lightweight comfort Outsole TPR outsole with the word SPORT in the form of lugs for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
